seoDescription: MVUSD Calendar 2026-2027 with first day of school, holidays, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, trimester dates, PDF download, and Google Calendar ICS file.
calendarNotes: Moreno Valley Unified lists 180 student days for the 2026-2027 Traditional Year - Trimester Calendar for Elementary School Grades TK-6 and TK-5 Butterfield Language Academy. Students return on August 12, 2026. Thanksgiving Recess runs November 23-27, Winter Recess begins December 21 with students returning January 11, and Spring Recess runs March 22-April 2. The end of the third trimester is June 4, 2027, and the last day of instruction is June 11, 2027, with a minimum day for students and certificated staff.
heroSummary: Moreno Valley Unified School District, also known as MVUSD, begins the 2026-2027 school year on Wednesday, August 12, 2026. The final day of instruction is Friday, June 11, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When does MVUSD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Moreno Valley Unified students on the TK-6 traditional calendar return on Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is MVUSD Winter Recess in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Recess begins Monday, December 21, 2026. Students return Monday, January 11, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is MVUSD Spring Recess in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, April 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of instruction for MVUSD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of instruction is Friday, June 11, 2027, and the calendar lists it as a minimum day.

calendarFaqs.q: Does MVUSD publish alternate calendars for 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MVUSD publishes separate 2026-2027 calendars for State Preschool, SDC Preschool, Head Start, grades 6-8, and grades 9-12.

customSections.label: MVUSD Calendar Highlights 2026-2027
customSections.content: Quick overview for the MVUSD 2026-2027 Traditional Year - Trimester Calendar for TK-6 and TK-5 Butterfield Language Academy.

rows: Traditional year with trimester dates and minimum days

customSections.label: Planning Around the MVUSD Calendar
customSections.content:
Families often use the MVUSD calendar to plan childcare during Winter Recess, family travel during Spring Recess, vacation days around minimum days, summer program schedules, and parent conference arrangements. Minimum days and trimester endings are especially important because they can affect dismissal times even when school is still in session.

For Moreno Valley and Riverside County families, the calendar can also help coordinate shared childcare, after-school coverage, and travel plans with nearby Inland Empire districts that may not use the same recess weeks or trimester schedule.

Because Moreno Valley Unified publishes separate calendars for preschool, Head Start, grades 6-8, and grades 9-12, families should confirm the correct calendar before making travel, childcare, or transportation plans.

customSections.label: MVUSD Calendar Download Options
customSections.content: MVUSD families can use the official PDF when they need a printable calendar and the calendar file when they want reviewed dates in a personal calendar app.

rows: Printing, saving, and checking the official district layout
Use the MVUSD PDF as the source document for the TK-6 traditional calendar.
Adding reviewed dates to Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, or another calendar app
The file is a one-time import and not a live district sync.
Preschool, Head Start, grades 6-8, grades 9-12, and program-specific schedules
Use the official alternate calendar links when the TK-6 traditional calendar does not apply.

customSections.label: Frequently Updated MVUSD Dates
customSections.content: Some MVUSD calendar details may change after publication, including emergency closures, weather-related cancellations, board-approved revisions, school-specific events, and campus schedule announcements. MySchoolDates summarizes the published district calendar, but families should use Moreno Valley Unified as the source of record before making time-sensitive plans.
